headline: Amazon (AMZN) Is Cutting Prices On 13,000 Grocery Items To Win More Shoppers
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is pushing an affordability drive in its grocery segment, with a focus on broader perishables and expanded same day delivery. The company is cutting prices on more than 13,000 grocery products as part of this effort. A senior vice president at Amazon highlighted these changes as a key priority for the grocery business. For investors watching how Amazon.com uses its retail scale, groceries are becoming an important test case. The company is emphasizing a wider...
